description: Phase 1: Architecture Fortification & Contract Hardening. Establish strict boundaries and strict types.

userStories.title: Architecture Guardrails (Hexagonal)
userStories.description: Enforce strict Hexagonal Architecture layers using `import-linter`. Domain layer must be pure.
acceptanceCriteria: Refine `.importlinter` to enforce `domain` does not import `application` or `infrastructure` within `src/contexts/*`
Refine `.importlinter` to enforce `application` does not import `infrastructure`
userStories.notes: Current config forbids core->infra, but we need deeper intra-context layer protection.

userStories.title: Automated Type Sync (SSOT)
userStories.description: Replace manual Zod schemas in Frontend with auto-generated clients from Backend OpenAPI spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `scripts/generate_openapi.py` to dump `openapi.json` from FastAPI app
Implement `npm run api:sync` in `frontend/package.json` that calls the generation script and type generator
Refactor `frontend/src/lib/api` to use generated types for at least one major feature (e.g. Character)
Remove manual Zod schemas for that feature
userStories.notes: Frontend currently has manual Zod definitions. We want strict automated contract.

userStories.title: Standardized Structured Logging
userStories.description: Migrate from custom `StructuredLogger` to industry-standard `structlog` for better observability integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement ASGI Middleware to capture `X-Request-ID` and bind it to structlog context
Ensure logs output JSON in production and colored text in development
userStories.notes: Current custom logger is good but `structlog` is the Python standard for modern observability.
